name: Freshworks CRM
description: Connect to Freshworks CRM (Freshsales) to sync contacts, deals, and accounts.

install_fields.label: Domain
install_fields.description: Your Freshworks CRM subdomain (e.g. 'acme' from acme.myfreshworks.com).

install_fields.label: API Key
install_fields.description: Your Freshworks CRM API key from Profile Settings → API Settings.
